historical_notes: Around AD 208, Zhang Chi was a bandit chieftain of some five thousand clans in the hills of the Dabieshan (Dabie Mountains). He was destroyed by Li Tong.

full_text:
Zhang Chi 張赤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Chi (張赤). A bandit based in Dabieshan, he was defeated by Li Tong. Zhang Chi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Around AD 208, Zhang Chi was a bandit chieftain of some five thousand clans in the hills of the Dabieshan (Dabie Mountains). He was destroyed by Li Tong.
